# v2.0.9

## Changes

- Manual AI review comments can now include one-off review instructions after the trigger, such as `@ai-review focus on parser edge cases`.
- Non-trigger `@mentions` in manual review instructions are preserved in the AI prompt instead of being stripped accidentally.
- AI review context tool follow-up requests now retry transient failures such as 504 gateway timeouts before failing the review.

## Assets

- Windows x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.9-windows-x86_64.zip`
- Ubuntu x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.9-linux-x86_64.tar.gz`
